name: claude-code-tools
description: Claude Code configuration tools - tests and utilities

scripts.test:bats:unit: command -v parallel >/dev/null 2>&1 && bats --jobs 8 --no-parallelize-within-files -r tests/unit/ || bats -r tests/unit/
scripts.test:bats:integration: command -v parallel >/dev/null 2>&1 && bats --jobs 8 --no-parallelize-within-files -r tests/integration/ || bats -r tests/integration/
scripts.test:bats: npm run test:bats:unit && npm run test:bats:integration
